Please fill in the sections below. Delete sections that don't apply.

Anything larger? Please link an issue you've already discussed with us.
-->

## What changed

<!-- 1-3 sentences. What does this PR do? -->

## Why

<!--
Optional if the change is self-explanatory. For features: link the issue
you opened first. For bug fixes: describe the symptom before the fix.
-->

Closes #

## How I tested it

<!-- What commands you ran, on what OS, and what you observed. -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] I tested the change on: <!-- macOS / Linux / Windows / WSL -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (no user-visible behavior change beyond fixing the bug)
- [ ] New feature (new command, flag, or behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI / build / repo config
- [ ] Breaking change — existing users need to update their manifests or commands

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I've added tests for new behavior (or explained why they weren't needed)
- [ ] I've updated docs (README, inline help text) if user-facing
- [ ] My commits are in imperative mood (`feat(deploy): foo`, not `Added foo`)
- [ ] I agree my contribution is MIT-licensed (see CONTRIBUTING.md § Licensing)
